programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid dismisses Jean's interest in the daily horoscopes as complete nonsense - but his opinion changes when they start coming true

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Geoff shows Sally his true colours as he tries to assure Tim that he is the innocent party, while Dev shows an estate agent round the kebab shop, much to Asha and Aadi's concern. Shona spends the day with David in the salon and Daniel confides in Adam how he's worried about Nicky

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Sally and Faye try to download the deleted camera app and CCTV footage, while the police tell Geoff that new evidence has come to light and they need to ask him some more questions. David confides in Sarah that he worries Shona will never return to normal, and Nina calls to see Asha and gently suggests that she can do much better than Corey

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Belle is upset when Paddy confronts her for starting a family feud and is also annoyed to hear Paddy and Marlon talking about her and Jamie behind their backs. As Harriet heads off to a religious retreat, Dawn tries to calm a paranoid Will, who refuses to listen and places an urgent furtive phone call

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Dawn admonishes Will, reminding him what happened last time he brought a gun into the house, while Cain notices the church door has been left open and finds Harriet inside sobbing. When Amy arrives at the Woolpack for her pizza tasting night she's hurt to discover Marlon has also invited others, and things get worse when Tracy arrives as there's an obvious frostiness between the two girls

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Another chance to see the feature-length first episode of the popular detective drama. Inspector Jack Frost's investigation into the case of a missing child uncovers a skeleton chained to a locked strongbox that tantalisingly turns out to be empty, but provides evidence of a crime committed 30 years previously. David Jason stars as the irascible detective, with Bruce Alexander, Matt Bardock and Claire Hackett

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth falls victim to depression after failing to prevent the murder of a society girl by notorious art thief Marrascaud. His confidence shattered, Poirot eventually returns to work when a lonely chauffeur begs him to find his missing soulmate, the maid of a famous Russian dancer. The investigation takes him to the Swiss Alps, where, against all odds, he stumbles upon a hotel thought to be Marrascaud's hideout - leading to a very personal showdown. The penultimate episode of the long-running detective drama, starring David Suchet, with Simon Callow, Orla Brady, Patrick Ryecart, Nigel Lindsay, Morven Christie, Tom Austen and Rupert Evans

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Rishi Persad introduces live coverage of five races from the Curragh, along with three races from Chelmsford. From the Curragh: The 2.35 Blandford Stakes, 3.10 Flying Five, 3.40 Moyglare Stakes, 4.10 Vincent O'Brien National Stakes and 4.40 Irish St Leger. With analysis from Matt Chapman, Sally Ann Grassick and Kevin Blake, reports from Natalie Green and commentary from Richard Hoiles

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The dapper Belgian sleuth goes on an Egyptian cruise on board an old steamer, but when an American heiress is murdered, his little grey cells go into overdrive. On questioning each of his fellow passengers, he realises many of them have secrets they want to remain hidden. David Suchet stars, with James Fox, Judy Parfitt, Emily Blunt, Daisy Donovan, Frances de la Tour and David Soul

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The headmaster of a local school is murdered, his body found pinned to the wall in the manner of his own butterfly collection. The dead man was a mysterious international club for geniuses, which are currently testing the school's pupils for possible new recruits. Barnaby and Winter investigate the secretive organisation, which has proven controversial in the local area, but also uncover the possibility of a connection between the killing and the impact of pesticides on a rare species of butterfly

programme.title: Inside the Crown: Secrets of the Royals
programme.desc: The documentary focuses on the royals' rollercoaster relationship with the press, beginning with the Queen's 1953-1954 Commonwealth tour, when cameramen worked hand-in-hand with the palace. A few years later, newspaper owner Lord Altrincham was attacked for daring to publish criticisms of the Queen, but by the mid-1970s Princess Margaret's hedonistic lifestyle was the subject of increasing press attention. But that was only the beginning. In the 1990s, the press has a field day over the breakdown of Charles and Diana's marriage, feeding on royal scandals

programme.title: Sanditon
programme.desc: It's the final visit to the Sunday night period drama, giving viewers a chance to find out how writer Andrew Davies has brought his adaptation of Jane Austen's unfinished novel to an end. On the night of the Midsummer Ball, romantic interests are finally resolved. However, the fate of Sanditon is in the balance when events conspire to leave Charlotte and the Parker family facing down impossible choices. Rose Williams stars as the feisty heroine, with Theo James, Anne Reid and Kris Marshall

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part two of two. When Tom McMahon becomes the third victim of a spate of suspicious fires, Banks realises he is now on the trail of a serial killer. A new discovery about the methods used by the murderer casts doubt on the alibis of all his suspects and the detective is determined to get to the truth at the Asperns' house - despite being warned by his superiors to stay away from the family. Stephen Tompkinson stars

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part one of two. Cabbot investigates when a woman is found murdered on the moors. As the identity of the victim is established, it becomes apparent any number of suspects may have had a reason to want her dead. Meanwhile, Banks is called in when the body of a teenage girl is discovered in a storage room down an alleyway. Stephen Tompkinson and Andrea Lowe star

programme.title: Davina McCall: Life at the Extreme
programme.desc: Davina travels to the Norwegian archipelago of Svalbard in the Arctic Circle, a harsh environment set across 15 million sq km of sea ice where temperatures can drop to -40C. She learns how huskies' thick fur is better insulation than goose down, that the deep pads on their paws protect them from the cold and their almond shaped eyes mean they are less exposed in a blizzard. She also tracks a polar bear to the open sea and witnesses bearded seals using their whiskers like feelers to find shrimp and crab on the ocean floor

programme.title: Paul O'Grady: For the Love of Dogs
programme.desc: Paul and the staff prepare for a visit from the Queen, who is arriving to officially open the new kennels, and one lucky dog is chosen for a special audience with the royal visitor - corgi Beama, who is paying her second visit to Battersea in 12 years. Elsewhere, the rehoming van has travelled all the way to the Isle of Wight to pick up eight Chihuahua siblings, whose owner sadly had no choice but to give them up, and handler James helps four-year-old pug Maggie comes to terms with being blind

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Former nanny Lavinia Seagram is found soaked in blood and it is believed she had turned to drink and drugs to commit suicide. However, Poirot is soon on the scent of troubled heiress Norma Restarick, who had problems of her own - not least confessing to the possibility she has killed someone herself. Guest starring Jemima Rooper, Zoe Wanamaker and Peter Bowles, with David Suchet as the Belgian sleuth

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid's tries to join the pop scene make him a laughing stock and he realises the generation gap is wider than ever

programme.desc: Fred offers Alec the chance to join Square Dealers. Ken struggles directing A Midsummer Night's Dream. Maud is stunned when Maureen tells her about her blind date

programme.desc: The coffin containing the mystery body is exhumed. Sophie tells Kim that she needs to get to know James again. DI Cooke arrives just as Chris threatens Kim

David Jason stars as the grouchy inspector, with Tony Haygarth, Diane Bull, Denise Black and Dominic Jephcott

programme.desc: Jim spends the weekend on a drinking binge. Tricia is annoyed that Jamie gave Carl their number and address. Fiona tells Alec she only wants to be a hairdresser

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Local boxer John Kinsella's successful world title bid stirs up hidden passions among the residents of Midsomer Morchard. As plans to stage a celebratory re-enactment of a Victorian prizefight shape up, jealousy, betrayal and blackmail take a ringside seat, while two suspicious deaths suggest Barnaby has let friendship cloud his judgement. Detective drama, guest starring Phil Daniels (Quadrophenia, EastEnders), with John Nettles and Jason Hughes

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: A casino is robbed, presenting Frost with a fresh challenge to his deductive powers, and things go from bad to worse when a local copper is reported missing and a well-known armed thug is spotted in Denton. David Jason stars, with Bruce Alexander and George Anton

programme.title: Griff's Great Britain
programme.desc: Griff Rhys Jones sets out to explore eight very disparate kinds of quintessentially British terrain, investigating how they have dictated different ways of living, working and playing - both in the past and as they are now - across the entire country, while also unearthing quirky and funny facts en route. He begins by heading to the South Downs, which are situated in Hampshire and East and West Sussex, taking to the air for a bird's eye view and attempting to get to know one of the region's woolliest inhabitants

programme.title: Griff's Great Britain
programme.desc: Griff Rhys Jones explores the picturesque estuaries of Suffolk and Essex in the second leg of his journey through the British landscape. Amongst his challenges are attempting to eat a 'Colchester Native', helping to build a replica of the Mayflower and enjoying the beauty of Constable country

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian detective is summoned to a hotel by a mysterious veiled lady who tells him that her forthcoming marriage is under threat because she is being blackmailed over a love letter. Drama, starring David Suchet and Frances Barber

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part two of two. The detective and his team find themselves investigating the murder of one of their own. Cabbot is convinced there is a link between the deaths of Lucy Payne and her colleague, but is dismissed as trying to push her career ambitions. However, after receiving new information from another force, she begins to uncover the real connection between the killings. Andrea Lowe stars

programme.title: Liar
programme.desc: Recently single teacher Laura Nielson is set up with Andrew Earlham, a widowed surgeon and the father of one of her students. The two enjoy a first date, but the next day rumours and accusations begin to circulate and the two find themselves entangled in a web of deceit and confusion. Thriller, starring Joanne Froggatt and Ioan Gruffudd, with Shelley Conn, Zoe Tapper and Warren Brown

programme.title: World of Sport
programme.desc: Richard Henwood presents action from obscure motorsports, such as bus and caravan racing and ice speedway

programme.title: The Car Chasers
programme.desc: Jeff Allen and Perry Barndt travel to Louisiana, where a test drive ends in flames. Later, they endure a boat ride during a thunderstorm

programme.title: Auto Mundial
programme.desc: The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.

programme.title: Motorsport UK
programme.desc: Richard John Neil presents action from Donington Park, including the third round of both the F4 British Championship and the Ginetta GT4 Supercup

programme.title: DTM Highlights 2020
programme.desc: Action from the racing series as the world's best drivers go for glory over nine stages set in Belgium, Germany and Holland

programme.title: World Rally Championship Highlights
programme.desc: The Rally Estonia. Action from the fourth round of the campaign, where the drivers negotiated fast gravel roads with plenty of crests and jumps

programme.title: Tour de France Highlights
programme.desc: Action from stage 14 of the most prestigious race on the calendar, featuring a flat 194km course from Clermont-Ferrand to Lyon. Gary Imlach presents, with analysis from Chris Boardman and Peter Kennaugh, reports by Daniel Friebe and Matthew Rendell, and commentary from Ned Boulting and David Millar

programme.title: World of Sport
programme.desc: Richard Henwood takes a look back at the glory days of British Wrestling, with some classic action from the archives.

programme.title: Tour de France Live 2020
programme.desc: Coverage of stage 15, featuring a mountainous 174.5km course from Lyon to Grand Colombier, as the riders negotiate 100km of flat roads, before heading to the foot of the mountains. Gary Imlach presents, with analysis from Chris Boardman and Peter Kennaugh, reports by Daniel Friebe and Matthew Rendell, and commentary from Ned Boulting and David Millar

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: A report from Southeast Asia, of something in the water that's sliced cleanly through a young man's testicles, is enough to lure 'fishing detective' Jeremy Wade to the shores of the Mekong - a river long renowned for its monstrous fish. But what kind of creature could have inflicted such a distinctive, surgical wound? In his quest to expose the unseen mutilator, Jeremy uncovers multiple victims who've been mauled, half-blinded, and even fatally wounded by the same mysterious assailant - a baby-faced killer that appears to be proliferating

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade returns to Africa's Okavango Delta to reinvestigate the tigerfish - a pack-hunting carnivore previously blamed for mauling the victims of a capsized boat. If these fish are as lethal as Jeremy concluded, then why aren't there more reports of fatal, piranha-like attacks? In a bid to flush out the true nature of these sight-hunting predators, Jeremy puts on his dive gear and offers himself as live bait

programme.title: ITV Football Classics
programme.desc: Gabriel Clarke introduces extended highlights of the quarter-final match from Stade Pierre-Mauroy in Lille, France. Chris Coleman's side had impressed many to reach the knockout rounds, with Gareth Bale and Aaron Ramsey in starring roles, but it was their less-celebrated teammates who grabbed the headlines against the highly-fancied Belgians in this entertaining match. Commentary by Clive Tyldesley and Craig Bellamy

programme.title: Sports Filler
programme.desc: Short film about the legendary racehorse

programme.title: Tour de France Highlights
programme.desc: Action from stage 15, featuring a mountainous 174.5km course from Lyon to Grand Colombier. Gary Imlach presents, with analysis from Chris Boardman and Peter Kennaugh, reports by Daniel Friebe and Matthew Rendell, and commentary from Ned Boulting and David Millar

programme.title: The Living Daylights (1987)
programme.desc: James Bond crosses the continents to help a KGB agent to defect to the West. While protecting him from an unknown assassin, the super-spy is drawn into the world of arms dealing and a plot to trade millions of pounds' worth of diamonds for weapons to supply mercenaries around the world. Action adventure, with Timothy Dalton making his debut appearance as 007, alongside Maryam d'Abo, Joe Don Baker and Art Malik

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: An intruder begins breaking into people's homes and destroying their plaster statuettes of Napoleon, but leaving more valuable items untouched. Holmes resolves to find out why, eventually uncovering a twisted tale of theft and murder. Jeremy Brett stars as the master detective

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Enemy agents use a fiendish device to transfer their minds into the bodies of Steed and Mrs Peel - whose subsequent strange behaviour makes them a threat to national security. Freddie Jones and Patricia Haines guest star

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur comes up with a plan to boost business at the Winchester Club by staging variety nights. The idea proves popular until the karaoke machine, rented from the fearsome Gabadini family, is stolen. George Cole stars

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle have reason to suspect their former mentor has turned 'rogue' for money after two key suspects in a drug-smuggling case are delivered to their killers. Action drama, with Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Glyn Owen

programme.title: Tour de France Highlights
programme.desc: Action from stage 15, featuring a mountainous 174.5km course from Lyon to Grand Colombier. Gary Imlach presents, with analysis from Chris Boardman and Peter Kennaugh, reports by Daniel Friebe and Matthew Rendell, and commentary from Ned Boulting and David Millar

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Suffering from nervous exhaustion, Holmes sets off for a break on the wild Cornish peninsula, where he hopes the peace and quiet will help him convalesce. Unfortunately, several murders ensure his holiday is far from relaxing. Period detective drama, guest starring Denis Quilley

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: The brother of the late Clement Armstrong devises a plan to avenge his death at the hands of the cybernauts by setting a deadly trap for Steed and Emma. Peter Cushing guest stars

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur dabbles in the world of nouvelle cuisine, taking bookings on banquets. However, his chef goes on the run from a group of gangsters leaving him in the lurch when catering for a policeman's retirement party. Vintage comedy drama, starring George Cole and Gary Webster

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: As whole estates of houses begin to crumble, CI5 uncovers corruption surrounding the awarding of contracts to build homes. Maurice Denham and Bill Fraser guest star alongside Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson

programme.desc: A member of a group of convicts slips off the roof and dies during a robbery. programme.title: Gone in 60 Seconds (2000)

Thriller, starring Nicolas Cage, Angelina Jolie, Giovanni Ribisi and Robert Duvall

programme.desc: An expedition to find King Solomon's diamond mines in the jungles of the Congo disappears without trace. The tycoon behind the mission sends his assistant, a former CIA agent, to find out what became of the explorers - only to discover that the party met a grisly fate at the hands of a horde of vicious apes. programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Formula 1

Ferrari marked their 1,000th race here, on the track that they use for testing, but the Prancing Horses will have had to first get past Lewis Hamilton, who was looking to extend his championship lead and inflict more misery on his rivals, as he chases a record-equalling seventh Drivers' Championship

programme.title: George Clarke's National Trust Unlocked
programme.desc: George visits the magnificent and meticulously crafted country retreat of Standen in West Sussex - one of the best examples of the Arts and Crafts design movement to be found anywhere in the world. He discovers a masterpiece of Gothic Revival architecture at Tyntesfield in Somerset, with its acres of flower-filled terraces, and unleashes a medieval catapult at Corfe Castle in Dorset, an iconic ruin who's first stone was laid almost a millennium ago, before risking vertigo with his trusty companion Loki at the highest point on England's south coast - the famous Golden Cap

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: Moscow Noir
programme.desc: Swedish thriller set in Moscow in 1999, focusing on ambitious young investment banker Tom Blixen, whose career is on the rocks after recent deals have fallen through. When his friend Fredrik asks for help selling some shares in a dead-end oil company called Neftnik, Tom sees a chance for them both to win when his researches turn up an unexploited oil field in Western Siberia. Tom must hustle in unknown financial territory to find sellers and buyers among very dodgy but wealthy businessmen, and his by-the-book boss Rebecka suspects that Tom is in over his head. In Russian, English and Swedish

Here they unearth a church pew, create a fish tank from scrap and uncover a special petrol tank

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Helen and David, Vicky and Geoff, and Sara and Thierry take turns to host dinner parties in north London for the chance to win a cash prize of £1,000

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer deliberately puts on weight so he can qualify as disabled and start working from home - but it is not long before he discovers the disadvantages of being his own boss

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Inside the Bomb Squad
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of the British Army soldiers who defuse bombs in the UK, providing an insight into the training they receive at 'Bomb School' in Bicester. Sergeant Alex 'Swansea' Hughes is called out at night to a woodland near Clitheroe, where a dog walker has found an explosive dating back to the Second World War. Swansea must make it safe by taking it to a large open field and blowing it up. Sergeant Sam Jones - a veteran of Afghanistan - has seen a spike in the number of calls the bomb squad receive in the UK due to the craze of magnet fishing. Treasure hunters hurl large industrial weights into lakes and canals but often get more than they bargained for, pulling out all manner of potentially deadly explosives including mortar bombs and hand grenades, with one man causing a major incident by disposing of a grenade in a dustbin on the industrial estate where he works

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking Family Favourites
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver pulls out all the stops with his 'totally bonkers sausage and mash pie'. It's not a pie with mash on the side, or even a pie with mash on the top - Jamie uses golden mashed potatoes instead of pastry to encase a beautiful leek, sausage and apple stew. Jamie also gives Britain's favourite takeaway, fish and chips, a home makeover that involves no deep-frying, making it both safer and healthier for the family. With help from his son Buddy, Jamie encases the fish in golden breadcrumbs that are shot through with smoky bacon, before serving it with smoked paprika potato wedges, mashed-up green veg and a light minty sauce

programme.title: The Yorkshire Jobcentre
programme.desc: This episode of the documentary follows Ray, a 63-year-old piano tuner who has been coming to the Jobcentre for two years, but his struggles with technology are making his job search difficult to keep up with. Suraya used to work in beauty, before leaving to be a full-time mum for 16 years. Now that her children are grown up, the 48-year-old wants to get back into the industry, but it has evolved more than she'd imagined. Elsewhere, 50-year-old Neil was made redundant eight months ago and is using his savings to get by. He does voluntary work in the community, but needs a paid job to cover his mortgage

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: This edition focuses on the importance of the father-son relationship and the potential consequences and difficulties when this relationship is not a positive one. Frontline officers talk frankly about their experiences of how the breakdown of this pivotal formative experience can lead to young men perpetuating cycles of violence, lacking confidence, or struggling with mental health problems

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Documentary following life inside an A&E department, focusing on patients and their families, as well as the work of the staff dealing with the emergencies. This episode follows the stories of three patients and how they cope when life takes an unexpected turn, including a patient who severed three of his fingers with an electric saw. Elsewhere, a man with motor neurone disease is rushed to St George's with severe sepsis, and a teenager struggles to come to terms with the impact of serious injuries he sustained in a car crash six weeks ago

programme.title: Call the Cops
programme.desc: A look at two very different manhunts involving the Devon and Cornwall police. The first case involves a car which flipped off the road while travelling at over 100mph and hit a tree. When officers arrive at the scene, they discover that the driver and passengers have fled the scene. A 17-strong team, with armed support, a dog unit and aerial assets, ventures into the surrounding woodland to discover where they have gone. Control also receives a call to be on the lookout for a missing man who is reported to be suicidal and whose whereabouts are uncertain

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in Redondo Beach, California, for the first of two visits to Zayna Flaming Grill, a Mediterranean restaurant owned and run by aunt and niece Faye and Brenda. Faye believes she has the weight of the entire restaurant on her shoulders, while Brenda feels she isn't treated as an equal in the business. With tensions rising, the food not up to scratch and everyone playing the blame game, the chef is faced with one of the trickiest situations he's ever encountered

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In east Lancashire, young entrepreneur Ellie and her drama teacher partner Andy kick off the competition with an oriental-themed menu. Day two sees stylish couple Jon and his partner Chris lay on a Mediterranean menu, with influence from their mothers. Finally, Gladys and her hubby Stephen are able to show off their passion for travel with a global menu, though there's a surprise in store for their guests when Stephen makes a revelation about his wife

programme.title: This Is Us

programme.desc: A selection of the team's favourite investigations. Matt Tebbutt travels to the Netherlands to explore the myth that Edam was once used as emergency cannon balls and Jimmy Doherty learns about an innovative solution to the problem of shellfish feeding on discarded plastic in the sea

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves (1991)
programme.desc: English nobleman Robin of Locksley returns home from fighting in the Crusades, only to discover that his father has been murdered and his lands seized, while the local people are living in fear under the tyrannical rule of the Sheriff of Nottingham. Branded an outlaw for his defiance, he and his Moorish travelling companion go into hiding in the forest, where they recruit a group of bandits to fight for justice, protect the downtrodden, and foil the Sheriff's plan to seize the throne while the king is away at war. programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies

programme.title: Jeremy Vine

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul Bohill and Phil Short must deal with a negligent tenant who fled upon their arrival, forcing the agents to set a trap in order to evict him. Brian O'Shaughnessy and Kevin Stokes chase a debt of £5,000 in Kent, before heading to Surrey to recover £11,000 owed by the owner a bespoke furniture business. Plus, Paul and Steve Pinner's patience is tested to the limit when they are sent to carry out an eviction in London

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Yorkshire police forces tackling an ever-more sophisticated criminal fraternity from the cities to the Dales. Police from the north and west of the historic county crack down on drug-addled drivers, and it is North Yorkshire's Roads Policing Group that faces the toughest challenge when a convicted drug dealer leads officers on a 140mph chase on one of the UK's busiest motorways. Jamie Theakston narrates

programme.title: Home and Away

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Dipi is stunned when Shane finally comes clean and admits the truth, while Mackenzie is outraged to learn that Richie was the one who gave Shane his first taste of drugs

programme.title: His Perfect Obsession (2018)
programme.desc: A woman returns to her hometown with her blind daughter, and is unexpectedly reunited with an old schoolfriend. While he is helpful in getting her settled back in, she does not realise that behind his friendly demeanour is a lifelong fixation on her which is about to turn dangerous. Thriller, starring Arianne Zucker and Ali Skovbye

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Emily asks Ross to move away from his friends, while Monica and Rachel are understandably taken aback to meet a hairy man who they mistake for a yeti. American comedy, starring David Schwimmer and Helen Baxendale

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross moves in with Chandler and Joey, but the transition does not go as smoothly as expected. Danny deals Rachel's ego a blow by introducing her to an exceptionally dull date, and Phoebe becomes disillusioned with the health inspector she is seeing

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Dipi is stunned when Shane finally comes clean and admits the truth, while Mackenzie is outraged to learn that Richie was the one who gave Shane his first taste of drugs

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Australian soap opera charting the latest comings and goings of the residents of Summer Bay

programme.title: 5 News Tonight
programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories

programme.title: Gallagher Premiership Rugby Highlights
programme.desc: Including action from the clash between Saracens and Exeter Chiefs, along with Leicester Tigers v Northampton Saints and Sale Sharks v Bath

programme.title: Ultimate Police Interceptors
programme.desc: In Co Durham, a van tries to lose Interceptors Richie Gatland and Andrew 'AJ' Terry on the country roads, traveling at more than 100mph and attempting to reverse ram the police car. Sergeant Kev Salter and Spike apprehend a suspect whose car is crammed full of stolen chickens, while Steve Adey summons his inner Mo Farah and tracks down a drug-driver after a spot of cross-country running

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red
programme.desc: Critical care paramedic Rob and doctor Adam fight to save the life of a boy who has been stabbed in the street. The 16-year-old has been knifed in the neck, has lost a significant amount of blood and is struggling to breathe. Elsewhere, Tom Waters is dispatched to 30-year-old bricklayer Daniel, who has sliced his arm with a power saw. He was cutting timber on a workbench using an angle grinder with a circular blade when he lost control and it sliced through his right hand

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: The crimes of serial killer Dennis Nilsen, who was arrested in February 1983 after human remains were found in his household drains. It was later discovered he had liked to bathe and dress his victims' corpses, and was guilty of killing at least 12 young men in and around his home in the north London district of Muswell Hill

programme.title: James Bulger: The New Revelations
programme.desc: Broadcast 25 years since the end of the trial, this documentary looks at the case of James Bulger, who was kidnapped in 1993 from a Liverpool shopping centre at the age of two and murdered by 10-year-old boys Robert Thompson and Jon Venables. Comprising testimony and evidence from those who knew them well and dealt with them at the time of the prosecution, this documentary offers new and startling evidence, throwing light on what turned two 10-year-old boys into killers. In addition, new interviews and testimony from those directly involved in the case present the most complete picture yet of what drove Thompson and Venables to murder

programme.title: Live NFL
programme.desc: New York Giants v Pittsburgh Steelers (Kick-off 12.10am). Coverage of the opening game of the season for both teams, which takes place at MetLife Stadium

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Bridges
programme.desc: Rob Bell reveals the story behind the construction of the Forth Rail Bridge and how its incredible engineering achievement was born from tragedy and paid for in blood

programme.title: Wonderful World of Chocolate
programme.desc: Documentary offering a glimpse inside the confectionery world, visiting factories, chocolatiers and shops, and even revealing the Queen's favourite chocolates

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The first instalment of a two-part crossover with NCIS: New Orleans sees the Washington, DC team co-operating with their colleagues from the Big Easy to investigate a spate of lethal poisonings on board a New Orleans-to-DC flight. All the evidence seems to point to missing chef Luca, who happens to be Abby's brother, so the two investigative services join forces to locate him, and find out why a private tech firm seems to have been targetted by the killer. Naval crime drama, guest starring Scott Bakula

programme.title: Great Scientists
programme.desc: Profile of 16th-century Italian astronomer Galileo Galilei, whose observations through a telescope of his own invention led him to defend the Copernican thesis that Earth orbited the sun instead of vice versa - a view that got him into trouble with the Inquisition. Presented by Allan Chapman

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Ann Maurice and Alistair Appleton renovate neglected hallways in Hammersmith, west London, and Headingley in north Leeds. They move on to a bachelor's living room in desperate need of a tidy-up, where they install a Georgian fireplace and piano to replace the booze and ironing boards

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The piglet and her family return from their holiday, while Suzy has missed her friend and is eager to see her again

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.desc: George loses the key to his toy robot so Grandpa decides to uses his old metal detector to look for it. But he cannot find his old metal detector

programme.title: Paw Patrol

programme.desc: Turbo, Big Boo and Hopper pretend to be sick to get out of helping the girls pick raspberries, but Iris and Shiny know just how to get them to work

programme.title: Jeremy Vine
programme.desc: The broadcaster and guests discuss the issues of the day, with co-host Storm Huntley joining him for phone-ins and reading out viewers' correspondence

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Stewart McCracken and Elmore Victor head to Liverpool for what they expect to be a routine repossession, but instead face the most challenging eviction of their careers. Behind the front door, they find a critically ill two-year-old child with major heart problems, who is on constant life support and unable to breathe without a ventilator. Meanwhile, Brian O'Shaughnessy and Del Anglin chase £2,000 worth of debt owed by a business based in Kent, and recover £4,000 from a recycling business in Buckinghamshire. Plus, Stewart and Elmore encounter another family in crisis in Birmingham, where a retired couple who acted as guarantor for their daughter's tenancy are liable to pay over £3,000 after she defaulted

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: West Yorkshire officers take action against a teenage driver after he leads them on a high-speed chase across Roundhay Park in Leeds, while the cops also face a battle to keep up with uninsured drivers who flout the law without fear of consequence

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Colby's effort to provide Bella with a false alibi backfires when her level of panic and anxiety before her interrogation intensifies. Jasmine is on a path of redemption

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Yashvi takes Shane to the station for formal questioning and Mackenzie is so overwhelmed that she decides not to apply as a candidate for the youth advisor position

programme.title: My Husband's Secret Life (2018)
programme.desc: A woman recovering from a miscarriage suspects that her husband is cheating on her. However, when a sudden accident leaves him in a coma, she realises the secret he is hiding is something far more dangerous than an affair. Thriller, starring Kara Killmer and Brett Donahue

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The pals digest a huge Thanksgiving meal and reminisce about their worst holiday experiences, including the time Chandler's father left his mother in favour of the houseboy, and the occasion in 1987 when a teenage Monica overheard Chandler calling her fat. Guest starring Morgan Fairchild

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey tries to cover up Chandler and Monica's relationship - but only succeeds in making himself look stupid. Phoebe persuades Rachel to take a literature class with her, while Ross falls out with his co-workers, convinced one of them stole his prized sandwich

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Yashvi takes Shane to the station for formal questioning and Mackenzie is so overwhelmed that she decides not to apply as a candidate for the youth advisor position

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Colby's effort to provide Bella with a false alibi backfires when her level of panic and anxiety before her interrogation intensifies. Jasmine is on a path of redemption

programme.title: 5 News Tonight
programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Graeme Hall trains a German shepherd anxious about her puppy, a bulldog that is always stealing food and faces a particular challenge with a picnic, and a boxer that is driving a wedge between its owners

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian has to help a ewe through a difficult birth in the middle of a field in the rain, while Peter performs an emergency C-section on a heavily pregnant shih tzu. A male goat presents a serious problem for its owners when it impregnates all the females in the pen, a cat undergoes emergency eye surgery, and a calf is in urgent need of its mother's milk

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: Siegfried applies to become attending vet at Darrowby racecourse - but the position comes with conditions, and he is torn between his ambition and his loyalty to the practice. Tristan collects the debts owed to the surgery, but ends up losing all the money and resorts to placing a risky bet to cover up his mistake. When the favourite to win on the race day is diagnosed with a inoperable condition, James has his first painful experience of having to put an animal down - only to end up being threatened with legal action by the owner

programme.title: Charles & Camilla: Controversy & The Crown
programme.desc: A look at the relationship between the Prince of Wale and the Duchess of Cornwall, investigating how the pair met and the tumultuous beginnings of their romance. From forbidden love that caused scandal in the palace, to Camilla winning the hearts of the nation after becoming the prince's second wife, it has been quite a journey for the royal couple..The programme also explores what might be expected from Charles's reign when he becomes king and whether people will accept Camilla as queen

programme.title: Adele: In Her Own Words
programme.desc: Documentary charting the meteoric rise to stardom of the singer, whose debut album 19 was released in 2008, with two further records - 21 and 25 - following in 2011 and 2015. Former school friends reminisce about Adele's early years, while producer Jim Abbiss recounts tales from his time in the recording studio with her. Friend and blogger Perez Hilton, DJ Paul Gambaccini and soul singer Rumer also explain why the world loves Adele

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team suspects foul play when a seaman who was set to testify before a grand jury dies before he can make his court appearance. When it becomes clear the man was murdered, the subsequent investigation reveals that a previously thwarted human-trafficking ring has been re-established. Meanwhile, a storm causes a massive power outage, and McGee seeks a room for the night among his colleagues. Naval crime drama, starring Sean Murray

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A deep-sea diver is murdered on the job, and his co-workers all become suspects. However, when they return to the surface, they must remain in a high-tech decompression chamber for four days. With each of their suspects confined within a tank, the NCIS team must complete an unorthodox investigation from the outside. Starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: Great Scientists
programme.desc: Historian Allan Chapman discusses Isaac Newton's revolutionary theories, which postulated that the universe is governed by a single set of mathematical principles. Newton produced a complex formula to describe the laws of gravity, and by the time of his death in 1727, the groundwork of modern physics had been laid

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Design guru Ann Maurice visits a house with an unsightly pile of brick rubble, investigates a property whose garden is a potential death trap, and delivers her verdict on a conservatory used to store laundry in this compilation of highlights from the series

programme.title: Carry On Sergeant (1958)
programme.desc: A military sergeant approaching retirement hopes to end his career on a high note by seeing his last lot of recruits come first in an annual competition to find the best squad in the forces. However, he is not prepared for the hopeless band of misfits placed under his command. The first in the comedy series, starring William Hartnell and Bob Monkhouse

programme.title: Puss in Boots (2011)
programme.desc: The swashbuckling feline joins forces with a cunning thief and a treacherous old friend to steal a magical golden goose from a giant's castle. He must save the day when it transpires that their actions have unleashed a terrible danger on his home town. Animated comedy spin-off from the Shrek movies, with the voices of Antonio Banderas and Salma Hayek

programme.title: Back to the Future (1985)
programme.desc: Teenager Marty McFly travels back to the 1950s in a time machine built by his eccentric inventor friend. The return journey proves tricky enough, but he also accidentally alters the sequence of events that led to his parents falling in love - and has to persuade his future dad to win his mother's heart, or he will never be born. Sci-fi comedy adventure, starring Michael J Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Lea Thompson and Crispin Glover

programme.title: Big Eyes (2014)
programme.desc: Aspiring painter Margaret Keane marries a controlling man who sells her artwork. As the paintings of large-eyed children grow tremendously popular, Margaret discovers he is claiming to have painted them himself, and she and her daughter are forced to live a lie for years - until she finally resolves to prove his deceit in court. Tim Burton's fact-based drama, starring Amy Adams, Christoph Waltz and Terence Stamp

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows (2016)
programme.desc: The sewer-dwelling heroes discover their arch enemy Shredder has returned from another dimension, and made a deal with an alien warlord. Assisted by two mutant henchman, Shredder goes in search of a lost device that will allow his new ally to mount an invasion of Earth. Action adventure sequel, starring Megan Fox, Will Arnett and Stephen Amell

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 3 (2017)
programme.desc: Following their win at the world championship, the now-separated Bellas reunite for one last singing competition at an overseas USO tour, but face a group who uses both instruments and voices. Comedy sequel, starring Anna Kendrick, Rebel Wilson and Brittany Snow

programme.title: Trainspotting (1996)
programme.desc: A heroin addict makes a series of attempts to kick the habit, but the grind of everyday life and a circle of similarly self-destructive friends keep dragging him back to his old ways. Following a near-fatal overdose, he comes to the realisation that the only way to put his life in order is to rid himself of his friends - which is easier said than done. Danny Boyle's drama based on Irvine Welsh's novel, starring Ewan McGregor, Robert Carlyle and Ewen Bremner

programme.title: Ted 2 (2015)
programme.desc: The foul-mouthed talking teddy bear is horrified to discover that he counts as property according to the law. He and his human best friend hire a pot-smoking lawyer to help them fight a court case and get Ted legally recognised as a person. Comedy sequel, starring Mark Wahlberg and Amanda Seyfried, with the voice of Seth MacFarlane

programme.title: BSL Zone
programme.desc: A series of half hour programmes aimed at reflecting the interests, needs and aspirations of the sign language community

programme.title: The Weaker Sex (1948)
programme.desc: A housewife regrets not doing more to help the war effort after the ship her son is serving on is damaged in the D-Day Landings. Drama, starring Ursula Jeans and Thora Hird

programme.title: Decision at Sundown (1957)
programme.desc: A gunslinger rides into a backwoods town intent on finding his dead wife's former lover and exacting revenge for her death. The man he blames now has total control of the town and has the sheriff at his beck and call. Undeterred, the drifter offers his enemy an ultimatum - he has until sundown to leave the town or face retribution for his crimes. Western, with Randolph Scott, John Carroll and Andrew Duggan

programme.title: The Last Blitzkrieg (1959)
programme.desc: The son of a Nazi general is selected for a secret undercover mission. He and his men disguise themselves as American soldiers and go behind the Allied lines, with the intention of carrying out acts of sabotage and undermining enemy morale. Second World War drama, starring Van Johnson and Kerwin Mathews

programme.title: 49th Parallel (1941)
programme.desc: Six Nazis are left stranded in Canada after their U-boat is sunk. As they try to escape the attentions of the authorities, they struggle to win sympathy among the locals. But when that fails, they decide to flee to the still-neutral USA instead. Michael Powell's Oscar-winning Second World War thriller, starring Anton Walbrook, Leslie Howard, Laurence Olivier, Glynis Johns and Niall MacGinnis

programme.title: Snow White & the Huntsman (2012)
programme.desc: An evil queen learns that her reign will last for ever if she kills a princess, so sends a renowned warrior to find and murder her. However, he comes to realise his mistress's evil ways, and instead trains his intended victim to fight so they can bring the tyrant's rule to an end. Fantasy adventure, with Kristen Stewart, Chris Hemsworth and Charlize Theron

programme.title: Miss Peregrine's Home for Peculiar Children (2016)
programme.desc: A boy investigates a series of clues left by his grandfather, and comes across a home for children with special powers, that has been concealed from the world using time travel. It falls to the boy to protect the home and its residents from a race of invisible monsters. Fantasy adventure based on the novel by Ransom Riggs, starring Eva Green, Asa Butterfield, Samuel L Jackson and Terence Stamp

programme.title: Brassed Off (1996)
programme.desc: The leader of a South Yorkshire colliery band is determined to see its members compete in a prestigious competition, despite his own failing health - but the musicians are more concerned with the threatened closure of their pit. Drama, starring Pete Postlethwaite, Ewan McGregor, Stephen Tompkinson and Tara FitzGerald

programme.title: Blue Juice (1994)
programme.desc: JC, a happy-go-lucky man on the eve of turning 30, realises he needs to settle down or risk losing his girlfriend, but decides to have one last fling with his mates from London and the other love of his life - surfing. Comedy drama, starring Sean Pertwee, Ewan McGregor and Catherine Zeta Jones

programme.title: The Spy in Black (1939)
programme.desc: A German spy falls for an apparently sympathetic schoolteacher during a First World War mission, unaware the object of his affections is in fact an English double agent, a situation that threatens to jeopardise an operation to destroy the British fleet in the Orkneys in 1917. Powell and Pressburger's romantic drama, starring Conrad Veidt, Valerie Hobson and Marius Goring

programme.title: 3:10 to Yuma (1957)
programme.desc: A farmer in need of money agrees to guard a notorious outlaw until the train arrives to transport him to jail. Meanwhile, the pair are holed up in a hotel, where his prisoner plays mind games with him - and the villain's cohorts are waiting outside ready to engineer an escape. Western adapted from a novel by Elmore Leonard, with Van Heflin, Glenn Ford, Felicia Farr and Leora Dana

programme.title: The Bravados (1958)
programme.desc: A widower visits a town where the men he believes murdered his wife are about to be hanged. When they escape from jail, he takes the law into his own hands and decides to hunt down and kill the fugitives. But over time, he begins to question whether his actions are right. Western, starring Gregory Peck, Joan Collins and Stephen Boyd

programme.title: The Enemy Below (1957)
programme.desc: The captain of an American destroyer in the South Atlantic is still recovering from the sinking of his previous vessel. He tries to outwit a cunning German U-boat commander, but comes to respect the courage of his enemy. However, his crew fears he is not up to the challenge of defeating his opponent. Second World War thriller, starring Robert Mitchum, Curt Jurgens, Theodore Bikel and David Hedison

programme.title: The Second Best Exotic Marigold Hotel (2015)
programme.desc: With the original Best Exotic Marigold Hotel a roaring success, owner Sonny decides the time is right to expand his business empire. But to do so, he and the rest of the residents must pull out all the stops to impress a potential investor's inspector - a task that proves to be easier said than done. Comedy drama sequel, with Dev Patel, Maggie Smith, Judi Dench and Richard Gere

programme.title: All The Money in the World (2017)
programme.desc: When 16-year-old John Paul Getty III is kidnapped in 1973, his devoted mother tries to convince his billionaire grandfather Jean Paul Getty to pay the ransom. Ridley Scott's fact-based drama, starring Michelle Williams, an Oscar-nominated Christopher Plummer, who replaced Kevin Spacey a few weeks before the film was released, and Mark Wahlberg

programme.title: Our Kind of Traitor (2016)
programme.desc: A couple are thrown into the murky world of espionage when they befriend a Russian money launderer, who asks them to smuggle classified information to the British secret services. The favour leads them on a perilous journey across Europe, with the Russian Mafia closing in on them. Spy thriller based on John le Carre's novel, starring Ewan McGregor and Naomie Harris

programme.title: Skin Trade (2014)
programme.desc: After his family is killed by a Serbian gangster with international interests, a New York detective goes to south-east Asia to team up with a Thai detective to destroy the syndicate's human trafficking network. Thriller, starring Dolph Lundgren, Tony Jaa, Michael Jai White and Ron Perlman

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three of the most difficult cases he has taken on since the series began. First, he returns to Cafe Hon in Baltimore, Maryland, where owner Denise Whiting was trapped in a nasty battle with the community and had threatened the locals with lawsuits. Next, the chef goes back to Chiarella's in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. When he first visited owners Tommy and Dina DeFino, the business was struggling so badly that Tommy had completely lost his confidence and wife Dina had lost her patience. On his final stop, Gordon travels to Leone's in Montclair, New Jersey, where Rose Leone was depending on her lazy son Michael to run the restaurant

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, where he meets a stubborn owner who doesn't react well to criticism. Tom bought the restaurant for his daughter Andrea, but six years later he's still refusing to let her run it. Can the chef break Tom's iron grip on the business and persuade him to change his outdated approach?

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom Carl plans a Spanish wedding for his fiancee Rebecca, as he tries to arrange the perfect day to meet her expectations for a high-class affair

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: Jo Frost helps Crystal Tobeck and Jeff Lawrence, who doubled their family overnight when they got together, bringing kids from previous marriages under one roof

programme.title: Wife Swap USA
programme.desc: A by-the-book school teacher swaps lives with a conspiracy-obsessed home-schooling mum who teaches her kids the world is flat

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry enlists his friends to help him break up Beverly's social group in order to get more of his mother's attention, but when big arguments ensue he realises he's made a major error. Adam's attempts to trick Murray into loving the theatre backfire

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Hoping to enjoy a true spring break experience, Erica and Barry pay a visit to Pops in Florida, but the jaunt isn't what they expected. Adam tells the truth to his parents when he has a mishap with Beverly's new coat, but he gets a surprising reaction

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly takes up dancing with her friends but is dejected when her family is unimpressed by her intention to perform a dance routine in a recital. Adam worries about losing his friendship with Emmy when she starts dating a handsome older classmate, but his attempts to be cooler than the newcomer backfire

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry gets the chance to throw the first pitch at a Phillies baseball game and believes this represents his opportunity to play professionally, but he couldn't be more wrong. Meanwhile, Erica makes an important decision about her future in college

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's grandmother, known as Meemaw, arrives in Pasadena to visit, but his excitement at her arrival quickly gives way to discomfort when she clashes with Amy. Meanwhile, Raj finds himself drawn to an ambitious female screenwriter he meets at the comic-book store, but Bernadette angrily reminds him he already has a girlfriend. Comedy, guest starring June Squibb

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

However, Bernadette is upset when Howard freaks out over her announcement as he becomes convinced that he needs to start earning more money. Comedy, Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: In the 200th episode of the comedy, the gang finally celebrates Sheldon's birthday after more than nine years together, with the help of a few special guests. programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Comedy, starring Macaulay Culkin, Joe Pesci, Daniel Stern, John Heard, Catherine O'Hara and John Candy

programme.desc: Captain Kirk and the crew of the starship Enterprise are sent on a clandestine mission into enemy territory to track down the rogue Starfleet agent behind a terrorist attack on Earth. However, the assignment brings to light a hidden threat from within their own organisation. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Chris Pine, Zachary Quinto and Benedict Cumberbatch

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Thirty one-year-old Sussex hairdresser Mark has appeared on the show before - but was rejected as a body in the face round. Now he's back and determined to find his perfect date, but will he make the right choice now the roles are reversed? Next up is 24-year-old basketball player Justin from London, who is constantly being 'friend-zoned' by girls so wants to try choosing a partner naked in the hope he finds romance. Anna Richardson assists both singletons, inviting them to choose their favourite partner from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time until fully nude

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.desc: Funeral service manager Peter Pickering hosts the second dinner party in Northamptonshire, hoping his traditional approach will win him the £1,000 cash prize. However, one guest does not like bread and butter pudding, and Stephanie is horrified by Jules's shocking revelation

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: As the third party from Northamptonshire gets under way, stay-at-home mum Stephanie Reeder's nerves are evident as she plans to serve classic fish and chips, while offering a glamorous clothes-swapping session for entertainment

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Business planning manager Lauren Oxlade is the penultimate host in Northamptonshire. She reveals herself to be the dark horse of the competition when she invites a few surprising friends along to the party, and impresses with her organisational skills and passionate cooking style

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Last to try his hand in Northamptonshire is managing director and proud northerner Carl Johnson, with a menu that includes gammon cooked in two litres of cola. Stephanie and Lauren are treated to a glimpse of the host in all his glory when they see what he has hanging above his bed - but it remains to be seen what the guests will make of his lumpy chocolate mousse

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Documentary following the stories of three patients being treated for cardiac problems at St George's Hospital, south-west London. Corey has suffered cardiac arrest while playing ice hockey, prompting doctors to keep the 24-year-old in an induced coma to prevent further damage to his brain. At almost 60, Angie has a history of heart disease and her heart has been beating at over 150 for eight hours, risking stroke and other complications. Doctors also carry out tests on 49-year-old Steve to determine the cause of his dangerously high heart-rate

programme.title: Emergency Rescue: Air, Land & Sea
programme.desc: Rescue stories from up and down the land, following the thousands of volunteers, as well as search and rescue specialists, who put their lives on the line. In Newquay in Cornwall, Rescue 912 race to fisherman Andy after he is washed off rocks and into the Atlantic Ocean, while a fun day out on the water leaves a group of friends and a dog stuck in mud in Cornwall

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: Wiltshire's emergency services deal with people who live alone, including an elderly woman who has suffered a fall but is clearly longing for a chat. Police are also called out to a residential estate in Swindon where neighbours have reported consistent antisocial behaviour from Tracey, an aggressive and combustible woman who lives alone. She is brought in on a drunk and disorderly charge, but once in custody the officers see another side to her personality

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This edition focuses on the treatment of sport enthusiasts who have had accidents on two wheels. Billy, 19, has been thrown 20ft from his motocross bike during a race, suffering multiple spinal injuries. Teacher Dave, 53, has facial injuries after riding his new bicycle into the back of a stationary car in Richmond Park, while 30-year-old adrenaline junkie and former Royal Marine Richard has badly dislocated his thumb after falling off a bike

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef visits beachside restaurant Barefoot Bob's in Hull, Massachusetts, owned by husband-and-wife team Marc and Lisa. Every year profits nosedive through the bleak winter months, and matters aren't improved when it becomes clear they have both lost their passion - not only for the business but also for each other. With the restaurant and marriage on the line, Gordon tries to help turn things around before it's too late

programme.title: Emergency Rescue: Air, Land & Sea
programme.desc: Rescue stories from up and down the land, following the thousands of volunteers, as well as search and rescue specialists, who put their lives on the line. In Newquay in Cornwall, Rescue 912 race to fisherman Andy after he is washed off rocks and into the Atlantic Ocean, while a fun day out on the water leaves a group of friends and a dog stuck in mud in Cornwall

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?

Police are also called out to a residential estate in Swindon where neighbours have reported consistent antisocial behaviour from Tracey, an aggressive and combustible woman who lives alone. She is brought in on a drunk and disorderly charge, but once in custody the officers see another side to her personality

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Craggy Island's most famous religious relic is due to be upgraded and Ted sets about trying to ensure the ceremony runs smoothly. However, Dougal and Jack put his plans in jeopardy when they meet the three priests in charge of proceedings. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan

programme.title: Kirstie's Vintage Gems
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp introduces new crafts, skills and techniques for interior decoration. In this edition, she reveals how to create a personalised vintage doormat and coasters, using spray paint, old tiles and serviettes

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: With retirement five years away, Graham and Janet Gifford, from Wigan, want to buy a holiday home that they can eventually relocate to permanently in the Italian region of Liguria. Armed with a budget of £80,000, Sara Damergi helps the couple navigate the Italian property market

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to Leeds and Preston in search of people's junk and clutter to upcycle into valuable new items. Henry makes an international set of clocks out of dashboard time pieces, while Simon builds an eccentric chandelier from car headlights

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit Cheshire and the Wirral, where items include a 1920s dancehall lighting system, an antique butter churn and an old enamel advertising sign

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: It's breaking point for Tim and Rebecca as they struggle to complete their kitchen as an expensive mishap with granite worktops put Rebecca's dream room in jeopardy. Meanwhile, at Ben and Billie's chateau, the duo welcome 60 guests for the wedding of Billie's brother Pete

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton meets Ele and Steve George, who are building an eco home on the banks of the River Severn in Gloucestershire, but have run into trouble with manufacturing delays and bad weather, while juggling the new build with a new baby. The presenter sends the couple to see one of Britain's most environmentally friendly self-built houses, in the hope it will inspire them to finish their project on time and under budget

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at the Vale of Berkeley Guest House in Gloucestershire, where owners Harri and Claire Chiba hope to prove that their establishment offers the best value for money. However, two guests from rival B&Bs have an issue with the no-frills toilet, and another places a tricky request for 'anaemic toast' at the breakfast table

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition moves to Artist Residence in Penzance, Cornwall, where proprietors Justin and Charlie hope to impress their rivals with a pottery class. However, one pair decide their room is too modern for their tastes, a duo are shocked to find hair in a shower filter and one guest seems underwhelmed by breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Third to host are Alec and Craig Coleman, who open the doors to the Edenfield Guest House in Blackpool and invite their fellow B&B owners to rate their establishment. However, on arrival one of the guests and his wife discover stains on the bedspread, while others feel the 'award-winning' food is not up to scratch

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the New Inn, Portland, Dorset, for the fourth day of the competition, where hosts Stacey and Spencer Cullum introduce their guests to a typical island activity - sandcastle building. Meanwhile, Claire Chiba quizzes Stacey about her breakfast hamper and says she is alienating customers, before Harri Chiba tells Justin that his B&B is too 'manufactured'

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The four sets of owners meet one last time to discover how much their rivals thought they should receive and to settle some scores. Two contestants attempt to explain away their negative feedback, and one contender finds herself unable to hold back her frustration, before the winner of the competition is revealed

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Visayan warty pig Wendy is fed up with the attentions of male pig Jake and decides to escape. Meanwhile, young giraffe Narus has been battling with other young males in the herd, so the keepers think that it's time to move him to a new zoo. Which is easier said than done

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet James and Graham, who are unable to agree about their 17th-century cottage in the Surrey village of Cranleigh. They need more space and while Graham thinks the answer to their problem would be to sell, James fancies an extension. Kirstie has an economical plan to redesign the house, while Phil finds out what £650,000 gets you in Britain's most expensive county

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Stephanie prepares to end the year in style by throwing a Christmas dinner to remember. However, with the ancient range cooker out of action and the 19th-century bread oven put into service cooking the turkey, it's a tall order to deliver a five-course extravaganza for 17 guests. Angel sets Dick the task of finding and chopping the perfect logs for her Christmas table display in their 12-acre grounds. Christmas cheer threatens to run dry for south Londoners Lee and Belinda as freezing temperatures and a broken boiler put their first ever festive event in peril

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets artists Indi and Rebecca, who are planning to construct a modern, larch-clad home on the Isle of Skye, with a second hand-crafted building alongside to use as their studio, all on a tight budget of £150,000. They have been saving for years, but making it happen will mean taking on the savage weather, not to mention the sceptical locals - and as if that weren't enough, most of the work is being done by one man, local builder Donald

programme.title: Inside the Zoo: Down Under
programme.desc: Vets and keepers work together as they attempt a procedure that is rarely done at Taronga - putting three chimpanzees on the hospital operating table on the same day

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show's version of the words-and-numbers quiz, with Johnny Vegas and Rhod Gilbert taking on Joe Wilkinson and Roisin Conaty. Tom Allen joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Scottsdale, Arizona, where he meets husband-and-wife bistro owners Samy and Amy Bouzaglo, who reveal a shocking contempt for customer feedback. The chef faces the biggest challenge of the series to save Amy's Baking Company, but can he get through to this defiant pair?

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Tree surgeon Paul, 38, is rushed into resus after falling 25ft. He is experiencing shooting pains in his back and pins and needles in his feet, leading to concerns he may have injured his spine. Meanwhile, 66-year-old Anthony, who has recently been diagnosed with Parkinson's disease and prostate cancer, has taken a tumble down a flight of stairs at home. He's very frail and a scan reveals he has broken some ribs, puncturing a lung

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show's version of the words-and-numbers quiz, with Johnny Vegas and Rhod Gilbert taking on Joe Wilkinson and Roisin Conaty. Tom Allen joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Inside the Zoo: Down Under
programme.desc: Vets and keepers work together as they attempt a procedure that is rarely done at Taronga - putting three chimpanzees on the hospital operating table on the same day

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty takes to the skies above Israel as he joins the battle to protect the bell pepper crop from the Mediterranean fruit fly and explores whether dishwasher salt is suitable to put on chips. Kate Quilton visits Vietnam to find out if coconut oil is any healthier than other oils and heads to the Amazon rainforest to investigate rumours that the Brazil nuts on UK supermarket shelves are all radioactive
